title: Magic number 255 for max LoRa packet size
description: lora_l2.c:159,362 — Value 255 used for max packet size. MAX_LORA_FRAME defined in lichen_l2.c:40 but not shared. Either use shared constant or document the SF10/BW125 PHY constraint.
close_reason: Used existing LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD constant (already defined in lora_l2.h) instead of magic number 255 in lora_l2.c at lines 159 and 368
